mapper.select: select l.room_name from CHome_Furniture f left join CHome_Location l on f.location_id = l.id where f.device_id = #{deviceId}
mapper.insert:
insert into CHome_Furniture_Power (device_power_id, power_type, power_name, power_value, unit, operation_code, update_time) values
( #{power.deviceId}, #{power.t}, #{power.n}, #{power.v}, #{power.u}, #{power.operationCode}, #{power.updateTime} )
